chapter_title: Department of the California Highway Patrol
article_title: Highway Spill Containment and Abatement of Hazardous Substances
text: This article shall be known and may be cited as the Hazardous Substances Highway Spill Containment and Abatement Act.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 2. ADMINISTRATION [1500 - 3093]
### Chapter 2. Department of the California Highway Patrol [2100 - 2482]
#### Article 4. Highway Spill Containment and Abatement of Hazardous Substances [2450 - 2454]
##### § 2450

This article shall be known and may be cited as the Hazardous Substances Highway Spill Containment and Abatement Act.

*(Added by Stats. 1980, Ch. 922, Sec. 1.)*

subsections.text: This article shall be known and may be cited as the Hazardous Substances Highway Spill Containment and Abatement Act.
